content.json:
# AI Metadata Enricher -- Pipeline Dashboard

The AI Metadata Enricher automatically processes enterprise data assets, generating AI-driven metadata descriptions with built-in quality controls and idempotency safeguards.

This dashboard provides real-time operational visibility into every execution, showing what the system decided, why, and how long it took. All data is sourced from `pipeline_completion` trace events in Application Insights.

---

## System Overview

These KPIs summarize the total volume of executions, the proportion that resulted in successful enrichment, and the average end-to-end processing time. A healthy system shows a stable success rate and consistent latency.

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| summarize
    TotalExecutions = count(),
    Successes = countif(tostring(customDimensions["status"]) == "SUCCESS"),
    AvgLatencyMs = round(avg(toint(customDimensions["durationMs"])), 0)
| extend SuccessRatePct = iff(TotalExecutions > 0, round(100.0 * Successes / TotalExecutions, 1), 0.0)
content.title: Pipeline KPIs

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| extend rawStatus = tostring(customDimensions["status"])
| extend DisplayStatus = case(
    rawStatus == "SUCCESS", "Successfully Enriched",
    rawStatus == "SKIP", "Already Processed",
    rawStatus == "NO_CONTEXT", "Insufficient Context",
    rawStatus == "BLOCK", "Validation Protected",
    rawStatus == "ERROR", "Processing Error",
    "Unknown"
  )
| summarize Count = count() by DisplayStatus
| order by Count desc
content.title: Execution Outcome Distribution

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| extend rawStatus = tostring(customDimensions["status"])
| extend DisplayStatus = case(
    rawStatus == "SUCCESS", "Successfully Enriched",
    rawStatus == "SKIP", "Already Processed",
    rawStatus == "NO_CONTEXT", "Insufficient Context",
    rawStatus == "BLOCK", "Validation Protected",
    rawStatus == "ERROR", "Processing Error",
    "Unknown"
  )
| summarize Count = count() by
    bin(timestamp, 1h),
    DisplayStatus
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Execution Trend Over Time

content.json:
## Decision Breakdown

Every execution results in one of four outcomes, each reflecting a deliberate decision by the system's quality and safety controls.

| Outcome | Meaning |
|---|---|
| **Successfully Enriched** | Asset received a new AI-generated metadata description |
| **Already Processed** | Asset was unchanged since last run -- no re-enrichment needed (hash match) |
| **Insufficient Context** | No grounding data available in the knowledge base -- enrichment safely aborted to prevent ungrounded output |
| **Validation Protected** | AI output did not meet quality standards -- write-back to the catalog was blocked |
| **Processing Error** | A transient or unexpected error occurred -- the message will be retried automatically |

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| extend rawStatus = tostring(customDimensions["status"])
| extend DisplayStatus = case(
    rawStatus == "SUCCESS", "Successfully Enriched",
    rawStatus == "SKIP", "Already Processed",
    rawStatus == "NO_CONTEXT", "Insufficient Context",
    rawStatus == "BLOCK", "Validation Protected",
    rawStatus == "ERROR", "Processing Error",
    "Unknown"
  )
| summarize Count = count() by DisplayStatus
| extend Total = toscalar(
    traces
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
    | count
  )
| extend Percentage = round(100.0 * Count / Total, 1)
| project DisplayStatus, Count, Percentage
| order by Count desc
content.title: Decision Distribution

content.json:
## Pipeline Performance

The pipeline processes assets end-to-end, with the LLM invocation as the primary latency factor. Assets that exit early (Already Processed, Insufficient Context) complete in under 200ms. Full enrichment cycles including LLM invocation and catalog writeback typically complete in under 6 seconds.

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| where isnotempty(customDimensions["durationMs"])
| extend DurationMs = toint(customDimensions["durationMs"])
| summarize
    AvgMs = round(avg(DurationMs), 0),
    P50Ms = round(percentile(DurationMs, 50), 0),
    P95Ms = round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 0),
    MaxMs = max(DurationMs),
    Executions = count()
  by Stage = tostring(customDimensions["stage"])
| order by AvgMs desc
content.title: Latency by Pipeline Stage

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| where toint(customDimensions["tokenCount"]) > 0
| summarize
    TotalTokens = sum(toint(customDimensions["tokenCount"])),
    AvgTokens = round(avg(toint(customDimensions["tokenCount"])), 0),
    LLMInvocations = count()
| extend EstimatedCostUSD = round(toreal(TotalTokens) * 0.000005, 4)
content.title: LLM Token Usage

content.json:
## Reliability

The system is designed to fail safely -- errors result in message retry via Service Bus dead-letter, never silent data corruption. A Validation Protected outcome means the AI output was caught by quality controls before reaching the catalog. Both scenarios demonstrate the system working as intended.

An increasing error rate or sustained block rate may indicate a configuration issue, a change in source data quality, or an LLM behavior regression that warrants investigation.

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Errors = countif(tostring(customDimensions["status"]) == "ERROR"),
    Blocked = countif(tostring(customDimensions["status"]) == "BLOCK")
| extend ErrorRatePct = iff(Total > 0, round(100.0 * Errors / Total, 1), 0.0)
| extend BlockRatePct = iff(Total > 0, round(100.0 * Blocked / Total, 1), 0.0)
content.title: Error & Block Rates

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Errors = countif(tostring(customDimensions["status"]) == "ERROR")
  by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| extend ErrorRatePct = iff(Total > 0, round(100.0 * Errors / Total, 1), 0.0)
| project timestamp, ErrorRatePct
content.title: Error Rate Trend (hourly)

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| where tostring(customDimensions["status"]) == "BLOCK" or tostring(customDimensions["status"]) == "ERROR"
| project
    Timestamp = timestamp,
    CorrelationId = tostring(customDimensions["correlationId"]),
    Status = tostring(customDimensions["status"]),
    Stage = tostring(customDimensions["stage"]),
    ValidationStatus = tostring(customDimensions["validationStatus"]),
    DurationMs = toint(customDimensions["durationMs"])
| order by Timestamp desc
content.title: Recent Blocked & Error Executions

content.json:
## Execution Trace Explorer

Enter any correlationId to see the complete audit trail of a single execution. Every pipeline run carries a unique correlationId that links all events from message receipt through to the final catalog write-back (or early exit). This provides full traceability for compliance, debugging, and operational review.

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp > ago(7d)
| where isnotempty("{CorrelationId}")
| where tostring(customDimensions["correlationId"]) == "{CorrelationId}"
| project
    Timestamp = timestamp,
    Event = message,
    Stage = tostring(customDimensions["stage"]),
    Status = tostring(customDimensions["status"]),
    DurationMs = toint(customDimensions["durationMs"]),
    Element = tostring(customDimensions["elementName"]),
    EventType = tostring(customDimensions["event"])
| order by Timestamp asc
content.title: Trace for Correlation ID

content.json:
### Recent Executions (for reference)

Use this table to find a correlationId to trace above.

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where customDimensions["event"] == "pipeline_completion"
| extend rawStatus = tostring(customDimensions["status"])
| extend DisplayStatus = case(
    rawStatus == "SUCCESS", "Successfully Enriched",
    rawStatus == "SKIP", "Already Processed",
    rawStatus == "NO_CONTEXT", "Insufficient Context",
    rawStatus == "BLOCK", "Validation Protected",
    rawStatus == "ERROR", "Processing Error",
    "Unknown"
  )
| project
    Timestamp = timestamp,
    CorrelationId = tostring(customDimensions["correlationId"]),
    Outcome = DisplayStatus,
    Stage = tostring(customDimensions["stage"]),
    DurationMs = toint(customDimensions["durationMs"])
| order by Timestamp desc
| take 20
content.title: Recent Executions
